_comment: Only two channels are supported: 'stable' (ROCm 7.12.0) and 'preview' (ROCm 7.2.1). Both pull prebuilt TheRock distribution tarballs directly from AMD's official repo at https://repo.amd.com/rocm/tarball/. Any other version or source must be rejected by the install step. This matches the pattern used by lemonade-sdk/whisper.cpp-rocm.

stable.description: AMD-official ROCm 7.12.0 TheRock tarball from repo.amd.com

preview.description: AMD-official ROCm 7.2.1 TheRock tarball from repo.amd.com
